capabilities.name: Local file read
capabilities.notes: Starts unverified until target-project smoke confirms scope.

capabilities.name: Local file write
capabilities.notes: Workers may write only owned paths after permission policy is active.

capabilities.name: Council MCP
capabilities.notes: Advisory only; no code-writing, merge, deploy, or launch authority.

capabilities.name: Claude Code project hooks
capabilities.notes: Generated under .claude/hooks; must be smoked in the target Claude Code runtime before relied on as enforcement.

capabilities.name: Claude Code project subagents
capabilities.notes: Generated under .claude/agents; canonical memory remains harness/shared and team context files.

capabilities.name: Claude Code agent teams
capabilities.notes: Enabled in generated project settings but still requires runtime smoke and operator approval before production reliance.

capabilities.name: Claude Code project skills
capabilities.notes: Generated under .claude/skills; skills route to file-backed harness memory and do not create separate authority.

capabilities.name: Codex fixed operator session
capabilities.notes: Codex is an equal fixed operator. AGENTS.md is the Codex-compatible entry; council/MCP bridge is advisory until smoked.

capabilities.name: Codex image generation for project bitmap assets
capabilities.notes: Use for project-bound bitmap assets such as hero images, product photos, mock photographs, raster illustrations, and image variants. Workspace outputs must be copied into the project and recorded. If unavailable, record NOT-RUN and use an approved fallback.

capabilities.name: Context-saving plugin stack
capabilities.notes: PLUGIN_ROUTING.json caps active context plugins at 4 and includes caveman as preferred compression slot. Plugin output is advisory until written to harness files.

capabilities.name: Configured routine worker session
capabilities.notes: Preferred for simple, well-specified delegated chores when available, safe, and sufficient for the gate. Operators remain highest verified model/effort.

capabilities.name: Optional user-owned agent surfaces
capabilities.notes: Configured through AGENT_PROVIDER_OVERRIDES.json only when requested. Extra surfaces may support workers, evaluators, or council review after login and smoke evidence; they do not replace Codex/Claude fixed operators by default.

capabilities.name: Local harnessctl event and report helper
capabilities.notes: Generated at scripts/harnessctl.py. It appends events, validates, checks visualization specs, runs local eval suites, archives tasks, compiles context packs, worker briefs, task packets, concept checks, software feedback evidence, model routes, and static HTML reports as views over canonical files.

capabilities.name: Read-only harness MCP server export
capabilities.notes: Generated under harness/mcp_server. Read-only context export for search_past_decisions and related tools; output is advisory until summarized into canonical files.

capabilities.name: Cloud or server-side task lane
capabilities.notes: Must pass bounded cloud smoke before production use.
